headline: Why Dominion Energy (D) Is Central to Virginia’s Data Center Power Surge
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) is one of the utility stocks riding the 2026 “Reliability Shock.” The latest relevant development came on May 1, 2026, when Dominion Energy, Inc. (NYSE:D) beat Wall Street’s first-quarter profit estimates as higher power demand in Virginia lifted results. Reuters reported that Dominion’s Virginia segment adjusted operating earnings rose 19.4% to […]
